Mana Seed Character Base Demo
=============================

Source uploaded by the user:
`FREE Mana Seed Character Base Demo 2.0-70806a72f922.zip`

Used in this game:
- `afshaan-sheet.png`: composited from the free page-1 body, outfit, and hair layers.
- `laiba-sheet.png`: composited from the free page-1 body, outfit, and hair layers.

The original pack describes this as the free Mana Seed Character Base demo by Seliel the Shaper and says it may be used commercially or non-commercially.
Do not redistribute the raw asset pack as a standalone asset collection.
